name: EarthDaily

overview.value: EarthDaily is a Canadian commercial satellite constellation of optical imaging Earth observation satellites, developed by EarthDaily Analytics (EDA), headquartered in Vancouver, based on assets acquired from the defunct company UrtheCast. Each of the 10 identical satellites carries an optical imaging instrument observing over 22 spectral bands (six visible, six near-infrared, six shortwave infrared and four thermal infrared) at 5 m spatial resolution. The constellation's first satellite launched on Falcon 9's Transporter-14 mission on 23 June 2025, and the next six launched on Falcon 9's CAS500-2 rideshare mission on 3 May 2026.

notes: Added in the audit Phase 3 backfill (2026-07-08), verify-then-add.
